problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
